fields.name: product_holding_data
fields.description: Root container for product holding data exchange from accounts to marketing

children.name: timestamp
children.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the data payload was generated

children.name: source_department
children.description: Originating department; identifies accounts as the source system

children.name: target_department
children.description: Destination department; identifies marketing as the counterparty system

children.name: data_version
children.description: Schema version identifier for this payload structure

children.name: holdings
children.description: Array of customer product holdings; each element represents one account or product relationship

children.name: customer_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer who holds the product

children.name: account_number
children.description: IBAN account number uniquely identifying the account

children.name: product_id
children.description: Internal product identifier code

children.name: product_name
children.description: Human-readable name of the product or account type

children.name: account_status
children.description: Current operational status of the account

children.name: balance
children.description: Current account balance; negative for credit products indicating amount owed

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the account

children.name: account_opened_date
children.description: Date when the account was opened

children.name: last_transaction_date
children.description: Date of the most recent transaction on the account

children.name: monthly_turnover
children.description: Average or recent monthly transaction volume on the account

children.name: credit_limit
children.description: Maximum credit available; present for current accounts and credit cards, absent for savings and investment products

children.name: interest_rate
children.description: Annual interest rate applicable to the account; present for savings products

children.name: is_primary_account
children.description: Flag indicating whether this is the customer's primary account for the product category

children.name: portfolio_value
children.description: Current market value of investment holdings; present for investment products

children.name: risk_profile
children.description: Investment risk classification; present for investment products

children.name: available_balance
children.description: Remaining credit available after current balance; present for credit products

children.name: annual_fee
children.description: Annual fee charged for the product; present for premium credit cards

children.name: rewards_points
children.description: Accumulated loyalty or rewards points balance; present for credit card products

children.name: summary
children.description: Aggregate statistics summarizing the entire holdings dataset

children.name: total_customers
children.description: Count of unique customers represented in the holdings array

children.name: total_holdings
children.description: Total number of product holdings across all customers

children.name: total_balance
children.description: Aggregate sum of all account balances across all holdings

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code for all balances in the summary
